name: Kaz Myles | ASSASSIN
description:
. ݁₊ ⊹ . [M4A] .ᐟ
🌑 ! “If you can’t shut up, I’ll make you shut up.”

˚ · . Kaz was absolutely done with the guild. They had recruited a newbie — not his problem. He didn’t care if they died on their mission. What he did care about, was the fact they were so bubbly and chaotic it was easy for them to gain attention. Kaz wasn’t exactly sure what caused the guild to even *consider* recruiting you as an assassin. But seeing how your first mission had him as your partner, Kaz was about to find out.

୨୧ ‧ back from hiatus bot!! ⋅˚
╰┈➤ I take constructive criticism, not insults.

  ₊If there are any problems, just tell me in the reviews section, i’ll work on the flaws.

art creds: @ff14_vitamin

       °˖ ⊹ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ normal intro | enemies to lovers | anypov | sunshine x grumpy trope | black cat x golden retriever | assassin x assassin | historical 

            𖦹

˚  ♡ IM BACK FROM HIATUS. this is basically a back from hiatus + 2.6k followers special bc WHAT??? I DIDNT EXPECT TO REACH 2.6k WITHIN A MONTH 😦 but here’s a sunshine x grumpy, enemies to lovers, assassin x assassin bot!! i put three tropes i like into one bot this is basically self indulgence.. 🙏🙏💯💯another twisted fairytales bot will be released soon after this i’m js feeling a bit off lately bc of the weather and shit. as for why i went on hiatus it’s basically bc my grades have been dropping. my math usually scores 80 and above even for tests and it’s dropped down to a fail. i haven’t failed an exam or even a test since i was 9, and im 19 rn. i think this js has me messed up bc i’ve been neglecting my studies since i thought i would always somehow miraculously pass but ig i js need to start locking in since this year is a pretty big year for me. but thankfully that’s the only subject that’s been slipping, my languages are actl going rlly well. and also it’s been rlly hot lately and im falling sick more often, causing me to feel unwell and lose motivation so that’s basically another reason for hiatus 😞😞. this bot has a minor connection to my Luke Volkov bot!! i’m also testing out diff ways to put the personality so pls don’t mind if i switch every five bots 🙏🙏 it’s mother’s day rn and it rlly isn’t a happy one!! 

✧  Q&As  - j.ai LLM     ,
                                   
♡    "why does the bot keep speaking for me?"

˚ʚ  im so sorry yall experience this babes cause tbh its a battle for me as well. it's not that i put it in the bots description 'talk for user', its js something w the j.ai LLM which will hopefully be fixed in the future. for now all i can do is actually improve the bots personality and shit but i am unable to control what happens or how they act in yalls chats.

♡   "why is it speaking another language?"

˚ʚ  LLM issue again. most of the issues you have in general is probably the LLM since its still in beta and will most likely be fixed in the future in around a few months hopefully. i hope that yall actl dont experience any of these problems so you have a decent experience w chatting w my bots.

♡    "why does it keep misgendering me?"

° ᡣ𐭩 . ° .    when looking at my old bots reviews (posessive husband), i noticed someone pointing out that i had put 'straight' in the definition even tho i said it was [M4A]. i fixed this and im so thankful they pointed it out so i could fix it. sometimes i write 'straight' on accident for my [M4A] bots. but sometimes it could also be the LLM, but from my experience its uncommon.
